title: DFU - Emu/Tern - Charge Case update needed popup after earbud DFU
scenario: "Case Update Needed" popup appears on Device Home Screen after earbud DFU, requiring charging case firmware update via Poly Lens Desktop app on Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20 earbuds
Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update
Complete the Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the earbuds
Observe the popup on the Device Home screen after DFU completes
expected: After DFU completes, no popup should appear, or the app should provide a clear in-app path to update the charging case firmware directly within Poly Studio Mobile.
